title: International Tech Expo 2026
purposeDescription: An intensive 2-day workshop on latest technologies including AI, Cloud Computing, and Cybersecurity. Perfect for learning hands-on skills from industry experts.
budgetBreakdown: Speaker Honorariums: 120000, Equipment Rental: 100000, Catering & Refreshments: 80000, Certificates & Materials: 30000, Marketing: 20000
sponsorshipDetails: Seeking platinum sponsors from tech companies. In exchange, Premium branding opportunities and booth space available.
fundSource: Student Activity Fund, Alumni Contributions, Corporate Sponsorships
riskAssessment: High attendance expected - crowd management critical. Technical equipment failure risk - backup systems needed. Electrical safety for lab equipment.
safetyMeasures: Campus Security personnel deployed throughout venue. First aid team stationed at multiple points. Fire extinguishers and emergency exits clearly marked. Lab safety protocols strictly enforced.
emergencyPlan: Clear evacuation routes established. Emergency assembly point at Sports Field. Medical support available at Campus Health Center. Communication via emergency alert system.
contingency: Alternative venue (Main Hall) available if main venue becomes unavailable. Sessions can be split into parallel tracks if attendance exceeds expectations. Online streaming option ready as backup.
